ab: nakemuda su mangetjez?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: nadjemavac aken a mangetjez.
en: I came on foot.

ab: anema su pinakavavavan a mangetjez?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: natjevavaw aken ta basu a mangetjez.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: uri kemuda su a vaik a sema kiukai?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: uri pivavaven aken ni kama.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: kemuda timadju a sema gakku?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: maka MRT timadju a sema gakku.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: anema pinakavavavan nua su vuvu a vaik a venli ta ljaceng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: maka utubaiy timadju a vaik a venli ta ljaceng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: kamuda sun a vaik a sema Lan-Yu?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri maka varukur aken a sema Lan-Yu.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: uri kemuda timadju a vaik a sema Lan-Yu.
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: uri maka hikuki timadju a sema Lan-Yu.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: anema tjinvavavan nimadju a sema Takau?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: namaka Kau-Tii/ HSR timadju a sema Takau.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: nama ka kisia timadju a sema Taitung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: uii, namaka kisia timadju a sema Taitung.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: namaka kisia timadju a sema Taitung?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ini, namaka hikuki timadju a sema Taitung.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: izua ljaljevavavan tua basu imaza i dudut?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: izua, sevecu a vaik pasaqayaw ki sun a pacun tua ljaljevavavan ta basu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: a tjalja dudutan ta ljaljevavavan ta MRT izainuan?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: neka imaza a ljaljevavavvan ta MRT, amin a makavavav ta haiya.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: nu makavavaw ta basu makudakuda a zikang sa djaljun i gakku?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: nu 15 min a zikang kidjemaljun i gakku.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: nu tjevavaw tua Kau-tii makudakuda a zikang sa djaljun i Tai-Ciu?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: ita tukian ki djemaljun i Tai-Ciu.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: cuai a zikang nu maka zitusiya a sema Ulai?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: tjra izua itazikang.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: pida zikang nu tjevavaw sun ta MRT a sema tjanuamen?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: izua 20 min a zikang.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: saigu sun a maka zidinsiya?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: saigu aken a maka zidinsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: izua su utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: izua ita a ku kutubay.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: izua su utubay?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: neka nu ku utubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
